ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the data collection */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data point */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality flag to indicate data accuracy */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., precipitation, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_parameters" (
  "station_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station-parameter mapping */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_parameters_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., rain gauge, anemometer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_sensors" (
  "station_sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station-sensor mapping */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_sensors_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
